title: Lean-Back Reading App Design
first_prompt: I'd like to add to this requirement to the design document: The target use case for this app will be reading text on a TV or large screen with the viewer/reader leaning back comfortably, using either
summary: Irwin was working to define the scope and technical requirements for a "Lean-Back Reading App," designed for comfortable reading on a large screen using simple swipe gestures. The conversation evolved by refining an elevator pitch to include compatibility with Vision Pro, which led to the decision to incorporate spatial gesture controls into the technical and development plans. Finally, the assistant guided Irwin on using the MacBook Pro M4 as the primary development machine and created a comprehensive setup artifact for the project, which Irwin renamed "Readar."
